ideal_customer_profile: B2B Service Businesses, traditional businesses, software development agencies, IT services, consulting firms, marketing agencies, accounting firms, and logistics companies with repetitive manual processes.

scoring_rules.criteria: The company is a B2B service business or traditional business (e.g. accounting, IT services, software development agency, consulting firm, real estate, logistics, marketing agency) that likely has high manual operational overhead and could benefit greatly from AI automation.
The company is a SaaS business or general B2B provider that is not specifically focused on AI or automation.
The company builds software tools for developers, but doesn't specialize in automation.
The company already builds workflow automation, AI agents, or API integration platforms (e.g. Zapier, Make, n8n, OpenAI). They will not buy our services.

buying_signals: Mentions of scaling operations or struggling with manual work
Focus on improving customer support or sales efficiency
Uses multiple different software tools that need connecting
